form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at Dortmund February 1 over 1800m, 13 len behind Mr Pablo carrying 61.5kg at $3.10. When resuming last campaign sixth of 10 at this track March 30 2025 over 1850m, 12 len behind Aquaman carrying 57kg at $17.80. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fifth of 12 at Krefeld November 15 over 2200m, 11 len behind Kopenhagen with 62kg at $10.70. Previously first up; second of 7 at Mulheim in the G2 May 24 over 1500m, 4 len behind Lili Marleen with 58kg at $16.90. Has the ability to run well.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of ten months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at this track June 9 over 2400m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Kampfer carrying 60.5kg at $22.80. When resuming last campaign second last of 8 at this track May 4 over 2100m, 4.5 len behind Oak Lahoma carrying 60.5kg at $22.40. Anticipate a bold showing.

form.formComment: Resuming after 11 weeks in the paddock. Finished off last campaign third of 10 at Dortmund January 18 over 1950m, 9 len behind Mr Pablo with 57.5kg at $3.90. When resuming last campaign second last in a small field at Dortmund September 21 over 2400m, 20 len behind Royal Ito carrying 57kg at $2.60. Can go on with the job this prep.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 18 months. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Dortmund October 5 2024 over 1800m, 19 len behind Dua Lina carrying 56kg at $6.50. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 4 len win. Mannheim May 5 2024 over 2500m slow track defeating Le Beau Rock carrying 63.5kg at $5.80. Best form gives him a decent chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 2nd of 11 at Dortmund on February 1 over 1800m, 8 len behind Mr Pablo carrying 59.5kg at $10.20. Second-up 2nd of 9 at Dortmund on March 8 over 1950m, neck behind Mr Pablo carrying 59.5kg at $3.50. Should be near his top.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Mulheim October 4 over 2000m, on heavy track; 18 len behind Oriental Power with 61kg at $10.50.
